notes: Raiding overhaul: ships now come in six hull classes from Scout to Dreadnought — bigger ones hit harder, soak far more, and JUMP AWAY with the loot when losing unless you cripple their Engines (a new target) to pin them. One unified Sweep lists several contacts (pirates and coalition together) by faction + class; pick your mark. Volley ×5 grinds big hulls fast. Raider interface redesigned.
